race.comment: NEDHAMMER HEN (5) went forward last time but couldn't quicken in the run home and finished fourth over 1400m at Wodonga. Can improve again here and will take catching from out wide in what looks a fairly thin race after the favourite scratched. BIVVY (2) is a gelding by Bivouac out of Sinaia set to debut for the Cindy Alderson stable. Has jumped out well enough and should be ready to go. DUKE OF OMAN (3) has raced twice to date, resuming in town when seventh at Sandown Lakeside. Comes back a notch here and will be fitter, respecting.  OVERFLIRT (9) was fair fresh at Ballarat Synthetic and can be an improver second up onto turf from a good draw.
